name: Motion API
requirements: Buffered Surfaces (for snapshotting A and B)

userStory.soThat: components slide, fade, and scale into place automatically when the model changes.

acceptanceCriteria: A motion() wrapper exists for any component
Layout transitions are smooth (60fps) and driven by the Heartbeat
Supports 'Keyed' children for stable tracking during list re-ordering
backwardCompatibility: Zero changes to existing components; motion() is a purely additive wrapper.

inScope: Interpolation engine for Rects and Opacity
outScope: Non-layout animations (e.g. animating character contents — use Shader v2 for that)

testPlan.goldenPath: Wrap a list of items in a motion() group. Re-order the list in the model. Verify that the items slide to their new positions over 300ms.
edgeCases: Rapidly interrupting an animation with a new model change
Animating items that are also being resized
Handling hundreds of moving elements simultaneously
testPlan.fuzzStress: Randomly shuffle a 100-item list every 500ms for 5 minutes and verify that no items 'leak' or drift off-screen.
failureCases: Memory leaks from orphaned Surface snapshots

estimatedComplexity.timeComplexity: O(N) where N is animated elements
